title: Login With Malformed Email Format Displays Inline Format Validation Error
description: Verifies that entering a syntactically invalid email address (missing '@' and domain) into the email field and submitting triggers an inline format-validation error message and prevents authentication.
expected_result: The email field shows an inline validation error indicating the format is invalid. No loading state is triggered, no API call is made, and the user remains on the login page.

test_steps.action: Fill the email field with a malformed email address
test_steps.expected: The malformed string 'not-an-email-address' is entered into the email field

test_steps.action: Fill the password field with a plausible password
Verify the email format validation error message is displayed
test_steps.expected: An inline error message such as 'Please enter a valid email address' is visible under the email field

test_steps.action: Verify the user remains on the login page
test_steps.expected: URL is still /login; no authentication took place
